title: Polymer clay faux labradorite pendant
notes: A pendant (approximately 40 mm x 30 mm, 4 mm thick) mimicking labradorite stone — dark grey base with metallic blue-green flash. Layer dark grey, charcoal, and small amounts of pearl or metallic polymer clay; fold and roll to align metallic particles in strata. Slice and mount on backing sheet. Cure at 110-130 degrees C in domestic oven. Sand through grits to 1000+, buff to high shine. Jump ring loop.
